document_title: Reviewed SMS Regulatory FAQ Source Facts

source_facts.value: political content is strictly prohibited

structured_fields.question: Is political content allowed in SMS messages in Albania?
structured_fields.answer: No, political content is strictly prohibited.

source_facts.source_quote: political content is strictly prohibited

source_facts.value: 1 day

structured_fields.question: How long does it usually take to set up a default account in Andorra?
structured_fields.answer: The default account setup time is 1 day.

source_facts.source_quote: The default account setup time is 1 day.

source_facts.value: From April 25, 2023

structured_fields.question: In Australia, from what date were dynamic alphanumeric Sender IDs without prior registration no longer allowed?
structured_fields.answer: From April 25, 2023. All alphanumeric senders must be pre-registered to avoid being blocked.

source_facts.source_quote: From April 25, 2023.

source_facts.value: All alphanumeric senders must be pre-registered to avoid being blocked

structured_fields.question: In Australia, from what date were dynamic alphanumeric Sender IDs without prior registration no longer allowed?
structured_fields.answer: From April 25, 2023. All alphanumeric senders must be pre-registered to avoid being blocked.

source_facts.source_quote: All alphanumeric senders must be pre-registered to avoid being blocked.

source_facts.value: Traffic containing mobile network operator (MNO) names will be blocked

structured_fields.question: What happens if a message in Austria includes the name of a mobile network operator (MNO) in the text or sender?
structured_fields.answer: Traffic containing mobile network operator (MNO) names will be blocked.

source_facts.source_quote: Traffic containing mobile network operator (MNO) names will be blocked.

source_facts.value: Local promotional traffic must be sent in Bengali

structured_fields.question: In which language must local promotional traffic be sent in Bangladesh?
structured_fields.answer: Local promotional traffic must be sent in Bengali.

source_facts.source_quote: Local promotional traffic must be sent in Bengali.

source_facts.value: Authorities in Belgium block all alphanumeric sender IDs across all networks

structured_fields.question: How do regulatory authorities in Belgium handle alphanumeric senders?
structured_fields.answer: Authorities in Belgium block all alphanumeric sender IDs across all networks, modifying them and converting them into short codes.

source_facts.source_quote: Authorities in Belgium block all alphanumeric sender IDs across all networks

source_facts.value: Alphanumeric sender IDs are modified and converted into short codes

structured_fields.question: How do regulatory authorities in Belgium handle alphanumeric senders?
structured_fields.answer: Authorities in Belgium block all alphanumeric sender IDs across all networks, modifying them and converting them into short codes.

source_facts.source_quote: modifying them and converting them into short codes

source_facts.value: The old format of 8 digits after the country code changed to a new 10-digit format

structured_fields.question: What was the change in the phone number format in Benin implemented on November 30, 2024?
structured_fields.answer: The old format of 8 digits after the country code changed to a new 10-digit format (for example, by adding "01" after the country code).

source_facts.source_quote: The old format of 8 digits after the country code changed to a new 10-digit format

source_facts.value: by adding "01" after the country code

structured_fields.question: What was the change in the phone number format in Benin implemented on November 30, 2024?
structured_fields.answer: The old format of 8 digits after the country code changed to a new 10-digit format (for example, by adding "01" after the country code).

source_facts.source_quote: by adding "01" after the country code

source_facts.value: 140 characters per segment for NEXTEL

structured_fields.question: What is the character limit per segment for SMS messages sent to the NEXTEL network in Brazil?
structured_fields.answer: The limit is 140 characters per segment for NEXTEL, instead of the usual 160 characters on other networks.

source_facts.source_quote: The limit is 140 characters per segment for NEXTEL

source_facts.value: 160 characters on other networks

structured_fields.question: What is the character limit per segment for SMS messages sent to the NEXTEL network in Brazil?
structured_fields.answer: The limit is 140 characters per segment for NEXTEL, instead of the usual 160 characters on other networks.

source_facts.source_quote: the usual 160 characters on other networks

source_facts.value: direct advertising of gambling through unsolicited electronic messages inviting users to play

structured_fields.question: What does the 2014 Gambling Act in Bulgaria specifically prohibit regarding SMS?
structured_fields.answer: It prohibits direct advertising of gambling through unsolicited electronic messages inviting users to play. However, sending lottery results or game names is allowed.

source_facts.source_quote: It prohibits direct advertising of gambling through unsolicited electronic messages inviting users to play.

source_facts.value: sending lottery results or game names is allowed

structured_fields.question: What does the 2014 Gambling Act in Bulgaria specifically prohibit regarding SMS?
structured_fields.answer: It prohibits direct advertising of gambling through unsolicited electronic messages inviting users to play. However, sending lottery results or game names is allowed.

source_facts.source_quote: sending lottery results or game names is allowed

source_facts.value: The Smart Axiata network

structured_fields.question: Which specific network in Cambodia blocks all SMS sent from unregistered alphanumeric Sender IDs since August 2023?
structured_fields.answer: The Smart Axiata network.

source_facts.source_quote: The Smart Axiata network.

source_facts.value: between 9:00 a.m. and 9:00 p.m.

structured_fields.question: During what hours is it recommended to send promotional or marketing messages in Canada?
structured_fields.answer: It is recommended to send promotional messages only between 9:00 a.m. and 9:00 p.m.

source_facts.source_quote: between 9:00 a.m. and 9:00 p.m.

source_facts.value: A maximum of 500 characters

structured_fields.question: What is the recommendation to improve delivery rates when sending UCS2-encoded messages to China?
structured_fields.answer: A maximum of 500 characters or the equivalent of 8 segments for concatenated messages is recommended.

source_facts.source_quote: A maximum of 500 characters

source_facts.value: the equivalent of 8 segments for concatenated messages

structured_fields.question: What is the recommendation to improve delivery rates when sending UCS2-encoded messages to China?
structured_fields.answer: A maximum of 500 characters or the equivalent of 8 segments for concatenated messages is recommended.

source_facts.source_quote: the equivalent of 8 segments for concatenated messages

source_facts.value: CRC (Communications Regulation Commission) in Colombia
source_facts.applies_to: Colombia marketing and debt collection messages

structured_fields.question: Who enforces the time restrictions (8:00 AM to 9:00 PM) for marketing and debt collection messages in Colombia?
structured_fields.answer: The restrictions are enforced by the CRC (Communications Regulation Commission) in Colombia.

source_facts.source_quote: enforced by the CRC (Communications Regulation Commission) in Colombia

source_facts.value: September 15, 2025

structured_fields.question: On what date will Twilio permanently stop sending SMS messages to Cuba?
structured_fields.answer: September 15, 2025.

source_facts.source_quote: September 15, 2025.

source_facts.value: explicitly approved and licensed by the Danish Gambling Authority (Danske Spil)

structured_fields.question: In Denmark, who must approve gambling-related traffic before it can be sent via SMS?
structured_fields.answer: It must be explicitly approved and licensed by the Danish Gambling Authority (Danske Spil).

source_facts.source_quote: explicitly approved and licensed by the Danish Gambling Authority (Danske Spil)

source_facts.value: local operators, particularly the Etisalat network, tend to reject or block requests and messages with generic senders

structured_fields.question: Why should generic alphanumeric Sender IDs be avoided in Egypt (such as "InfoSMS" or "Verify")?
structured_fields.answer: Because local operators, particularly the Etisalat network, tend to reject or block requests and messages with generic senders.

source_facts.source_quote: local operators, particularly the Etisalat network, tend to reject or block requests and messages with generic senders

source_facts.value: services, sell equipment, or perform work related to home energy savings, renewable energy production, or adaptations for aging and disability

structured_fields.question: According to the new telemarketing law in France (effective July 1, 2025), what type of services are prohibited from being promoted via SMS?
structured_fields.answer: It is prohibited to contact customers to offer services, sell equipment, or perform work related to home energy savings, renewable energy production, or adaptations for aging and disability.

source_facts.source_quote: home energy savings, renewable energy production, or adaptations for aging and disability

source_facts.value: sending cannabis-related content is strictly prohibited

structured_fields.question: Is cannabis-related content allowed via SMS in Germany?
structured_fields.answer: No, sending cannabis-related content is strictly prohibited.

source_facts.source_quote: sending cannabis-related content is strictly prohibited

source_facts.value: They must use the "#" (hash) prefix

structured_fields.question: In Hong Kong, what prefix must organizations use when registering their Sender IDs in the OFCA registry?
structured_fields.answer: They must use the "#" (hash) prefix, for example, "#Nevetscorp".

source_facts.source_quote: They must use the "#" (hash) prefix

source_facts.value: "#Nevetscorp"

structured_fields.question: In Hong Kong, what prefix must organizations use when registering their Sender IDs in the OFCA registry?
structured_fields.answer: They must use the "#" (hash) prefix, for example, "#Nevetscorp".

source_facts.source_quote: for example, "#Nevetscorp"

source_facts.value: overwritten with a random short number between five and nine digits

structured_fields.question: When sending international SMS to India, how is the numeric or alphanumeric Sender ID overwritten?
structured_fields.answer: It is overwritten with a random short number between five and nine digits in the format 5NNNN to 5NNNNNNNN (for example, 54321).

source_facts.source_quote: overwritten with a random short number between five and nine digits

source_facts.value: 5NNNN to 5NNNNNNNN

structured_fields.answer: It is overwritten with a random short number between five and nine digits in the format 5NNNN to 5NNNNNNNN (for example, 54321).

source_facts.source_quote: in the format 5NNNN to 5NNNNNNNN
